channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Free email services are costing you more than you think
item.description: Free email accounts come with hidden costs to privacy. Technology guru Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explores the risks involved with email accounts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Democrats flee X for Bluesky amid Musk-Trump alliance
item.description: Bluesky, an alternative social media platform to X — formerly known as Twitter — has experienced a large surge in users as Democrats, including a number of prominent figures on the left, announced their departure from the social media network owned by Elon Musk in the wake of the presidential electi
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: How to get started with Bluesky
item.description: Looking for a new social media platform? You could try Bluesky, where the vibe is seemingly welcoming and there are noticeably fewer trolls.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Mr. Miyagi's dramatic return
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The lingering questions around Nvidia’s strong quarterly report
item.description: This story originally appeared in The Technology Letter and is republished here with permission. Late Wednesday evening, some men were sitting around the Russian baths in Wall Street’s financial district talking about Nvidia.
item.dc:creator: Tiernan Ray, Fast Company

item.title: 5 ways AI should be fixing travel planning right now
item.description: Recently, I attempted to plan a road trip through Canada. What should have been exciting—imagining stunning national parks and scenic drives—became a digital nightmare of juggling 50 different websites.
item.dc:creator: Peter Smart, Fast Company

item.title: Earth bids farewell to its temporary 'mini moon' that is possibly a chunk of our actual moon
item.description: Earth is parting company with an asteroid that's been tagging along as a “mini moon” for the past two months.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bitcoin ticks closer to $100,000 in extended surge following US elections
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin extended its streak of record highs after ticking above $99,000 for the first time. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: OpenAI is thinking about building its own browser
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly thinking about developing its own browser with the aim of challenging Google’s dominance in the market, according to The Information. The new browser would have built-in support for Chat GPT and Open AI’s search engine Search GPT.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple and Google face UK investigation into mobile browser dominance
item.description: A British watchdog says Apple and Google aren't giving consumers a genuine choice of mobile web browsers.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Windows 11 will soon be available on Meta Quest 3 headsets
item.description: Meta Quest 3 and Quest 3S headset owners will soon gain access to the “full capabilities” of Windows 11 in mixed reality, Microsoft announced at its Ignite conference this week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: NetBox Labs launches tools to combat network configuration drift
item.description: NetBox Labs is expanding its network management platform this week with a pair of new products designed to tackle the growing challenges of infrastructure documentation and configuration management.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hypersonic jet promises NYC to London in under an hour
item.description: A Texas company is developing a hypersonic jet, Stargazer, that could fly from New York City to London in under an hour, redefining boundaries of aviation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI agents are unlike any technology ever
item.description: The agents are coming, and they represent a fundamental shift in the role artificial intelligence plays in businesses, governments, and our lives. The biggest news in agentic AI happened this month when we learned that OpenAI’s agent, Operator, is expected to launch in January.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: CIOs contend with gen AI growing pains
item.description: The road ahead for IT leaders in turning the promise of generative AI into business value remains steep and daunting, but the key components of the gen AI roadmap — data, platform, and skills — are evolving and becoming better defined.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Gary Gensler said he’ll step down as SEC chair. Bitcoin is soaring
item.description: Crypto enthusiasts are ecstatic after U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chair Gary Gensler said he will step down from his post on January 20 once President-elect Donald Trump takes office.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Thai court dismisses activist's suit against Israeli spyware producer over lack of evidence
item.description: A Thai court has dismissed a lawsuit brought by a pro-democracy activist who alleged spyware produced by an Israeli tech firm had been used to hack his phone.
item.dc:creator: Jerry Harmer And David Rising, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: AI-powered dog robot sniffs out invasive fire ants
item.description: Fueled by artificial intelligence, CyberDog the robotic dog is designed specifically locate fire ant nests, which are endangering ecosystems.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nvidia is Wall Street's most valuable company. How it got there, by the numbers
item.description: Nvidia has once again turned out quarterly results that exceeded Wall Street's forecasts. The company has seen soaring demand for its semiconductors, which are used to power artificial intelligence applications.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: US gathers allies to talk AI safety as Trump's vow to undo Biden's AI policy overshadows their work
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump has vowed to repeal President Joe Biden's signature artificial intelligence policy when he returns to the White House for a second term. What that actually means for the future of AI technology remains to be seen.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: How the U.S. Space Force can modernize at a smarter pace
item.description: Modernizing space programs while maintaining operations is one of the most challenging things, and rings true for the U.S. Space Force. The post How the U.S. Space Force can modernize at a smarter pace first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Eric White, Federal News Network

item.title: Australia won't force social media users to share their personal details when child ban takes effect
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia's communications minister said Wednesday the government won't force social media users to hand over their personal information to tech companies, as children younger than 16 are set to be banned from the platforms.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Forget driverless cars. One company wants autonomous helicopters to spray crops and fight fires
item.description: HENNIKER, N.H. (AP) — When Hector Xu was learning to fly a helicopter in college, he recalled having a few “nasty experiences” while trying to navigate at night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Microsoft and Atom Computing claim breakthrough in reliable quantum computing
item.description: Microsoft and Atom Computing have announced what they claim is a significant step forward in reliable quantum computing, unveiling a commercial quantum machine built with 24 entangled logical qubits.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: This tool is made for the laziest parent ever
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses how an innovative Easy-Way kit turns standard strollers electric, simplifying navigation for parents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: German police break up an environmental activists' camp near Tesla plant outside Berlin
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — German police broke up a protest camp housing environmental activists in a forest near the Tesla electric car factory in Grünheide outside Berlin on Tuesday, citing violations of public safety and order.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: A GRC framework for securing generative AI
item.description: From automating workflows to unlocking new insights, generative AI models like OpenAI’s GPT-4 are already delivering value in enterprises across every industry.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Succeeding with observability in the cloud
item.description: In its 2024 report, Splunk breaks down observability practices into four stages: foundational visibility, guided insights, proactive response, and unified workflows. Based on that, it classifies companies into four stages of observability maturity: beginning, emerging, evolving, and leading.
item.dc:creator: Info World
